channel.title: Intune Weekly
channel.description: A weekly briefing for Microsoft Intune admins. What is landing in your tenant soon, what is on the horizon, what shipped, and what the community is hitting in the field.

item.title: Edition 2 - April 28 - May 4, 2026
item.description: Hotpatch on by default, Secure Boot deadline looms, and Autopilot stalls hit production.

item.title: Edition 1 - April 21 - 27, 2026
item.description: Samsung Knox wipe-block locks devices permanently; Autopatch report shows zero devices for weeks.
